                                                                        3. Aran & Worsted
                                                                        4. Rowan Four Seasons

                                                                        Rowan Four Seasons

                                                                        60% Cotton 40% Acrylic, 75m (82yds)/50g (1.76oz), Worsted
                                                                        By Rowan
                                                                        1 review
                                                                        £3.38 Old price £4.50
                                                                        You save £1.12
                                                                        25% Off
                                                                        9 Shades
                                                                        This field is not correct.
                                                                        Notify Me When Available
                                                                        Beach (00002)

                                                                        In Stock

                                                                        £3.38 Old price £4.50
                                                                        Beach (00002)

                                                                        In Stock

                                                                        £3.38 Old price £4.50
                                                                        View
                                                                        • Free delivery over £40 Arrives within 2 - 4 working days
                                                                        • Returns Within 30 days of delivery for a full refund of the cost of the goods.
                                                                        • Expert help Ready to assist with your order
                                                                        Learn About Delivery Options (opens in a new tab)

                                                                        Product Details

                                                                        A truly trans-seasonal yarn with design support in Spring Summer and Autumn Winter. This smooth and soft all rounder is ideal for family knits.
                                                                        Net Weight
                                                                        50g (1.76oz)
                                                                        Blend
                                                                        60% Cotton 40% Acrylic
                                                                        Brand
                                                                        Rowan
                                                                        Care

                                                                        Cool Iron

                                                                        Delicate Machine Wash 40°C

                                                                        Do Not Bleach

                                                                        Do Not Tumble Dry

                                                                        Dry Clean in Certain Solvents

                                                                        Dry Flat in Shade

                                                                        Crochet Hooks
                                                                        2.25mm (B) - 2.75mm (C)
                                                                        Needles
                                                                        4.50mm (US 7) - 5.50mm (US 9)
                                                                        Tension
                                                                        16 stitches, 23 rows to 10cm/4"
                                                                        Length
                                                                        75m (82yds)
                                                                        Yarn Weight

                                                                        Worsted

                                                                        See Worsted Yarns

                                                                        Reviews

                                                                        3 out of 5

                                                                        Based on 1 review over the last year

                                                                        5 star

                                                                        0

                                                                        4 star

                                                                        0

                                                                        3 star

                                                                        1

                                                                        2 star

                                                                        0

                                                                        1 star

                                                                        0

                                                                        Recent reviews

                                                                        Am now half way through project, tried the yarn on wooden needles which I prefer for thicker yarns but it sticks to them making it hard work and the knitting does not flow. Knits up quickly but is not an even stitch, am hoping that after a washing this is smoothed out. I would only buy again if on offer to knit relaxed looking items.

                                                                        Janice Fitzpatrick 19/02/2026
